3200380.name: Gripshot
3200380.description:
Equip your Gripshot and jetpack to soar high, using speed and momentum to outmaneuver your opponents for aerial supremacy and blast all who stand below you.

The Grappling Hook will give you the upper-hand in combat, but it is the tool of elite operatives and your reflexes must be as sharp as your wits!

Reliable and effective, the Jetpack will save you many times and may give you the upper hand in combat.

Your weapons are the Machinegun and the Rocket Launcher designed for maximum aggression and control of the arena.

In Gripshot, every match is a fast-paced test of aerial precision and tactical thinking, as you grapple between structures, dodge incoming fire, and seize high ground for the ultimate advantage.
3200380.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
